faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Wantagh typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. Factors include home square footage, foundation type, and whether you need spot treatment or whole-house protection. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Wantagh, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Wantagh primarily deals with subterranean termites, which thrive in Long Island's moist soil conditions and coastal environment. These termites build underground colonies and create mud tubes to access wooden structures. Eastern subterranean termites are the most destructive species in our area, capable of causing significant structural damage if left untreated.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Wantagh homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Wantagh are completed within 4-8 hours, depending on your home's size and the treatment method used. Liquid barrier treatments typically take one day, while bait station systems require initial installation followed by periodic monitoring visits. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your household while ensuring thorough protection.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on termite treatment in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all termite treatments in Wantagh, typically ranging from 1 to 5 years depending on the treatment type. Our warranties include annual inspections and retreatment if termites return during the coverage period. We stand behind our work with written guarantees that protect your investment and provide ongoing peace of mind.
